en: It will rain tomorrow.
I will help you.
She will pass the exam.
They will win the game.
I will not forget you.
He will not come to the party.
Will you come?
Will she like this gift?
Will the weather get better?
Yes, it will.
No, it will not.
I will call you tomorrow.
They will come back next week.

zh: 她将来会成为一名医生。
en: She will be a doctor in the future.
We will miss you.
I am going to go to the library tomorrow.
She is going to buy a new dress.

zh: 他们打算下周末去旅行。
en: They are going to travel next weekend.

zh: 我们打算举办一个派对。
en: We are going to have a party.
He is going to learn to play the piano.

zh: 她不打算参加那次会议。
en: She is not going to attend that meeting.
What are you going to do?
Where are they going to go?
When are you going to start?
Look at those clouds. It is going to rain.
Be careful! You are going to fall.
She is pregnant. She is going to have a baby.
They are going to get married next year.
I am going to lose weight.

zh: 我们打算重新装修房子。
en: We are going to redecorate the house.
